issues_found.description: Pattern match on TransportType::Http missing fields `auth`, `bearer_token`, `headers` — added after pre-built binary was compiled. Compilation fails for ava-mcp crate. Used pre-built binary (built 2026-03-21 00:03) instead.
issues_found.fix: Update pattern to: TransportType::Http { url, .. } => Box::new(HttpTransport::new(url))

issues_found.description: Unresolved `bytes` crate in stream signature. The `bytes` crate is not in ava-mcp's Cargo.toml dependencies.
issues_found.fix: Add `bytes = "1"` to crates/ava-mcp/Cargo.toml or change the type to use reqwest::Bytes

issues_found.description: Plugin initialize params only include `plugin` name+version, NOT project.directory. So ctx.project.directory is empty string. Plugin writes .ava/code-stats.log relative to its own installed directory (~/.ava/plugins/code-stats/.ava/code-stats.log) instead of the project directory. The initialize call in manager.rs passes only {plugin, version}, missing {project: {directory, name}, config, tools}.
issues_found.fix: Pass project directory in initialize params: manager.rs line 86-89

issues_found.description: MCP initialization with npx @playwright/mcp@latest hangs indefinitely when the npm package needs downloading. The StdioTransport::spawn + MCPClient::initialize has no timeout. The agent startup blocks forever.
issues_found.fix: Add tokio::time::timeout wrapper around manager.initialize() in stack_tools.rs init_mcp()

issues_found.description: The project-root .mcp.json uses Claude Code's format (mcpServers object), but AVA expects .ava/mcp.json with servers array format. Claude Code and AVA use incompatible MCP config formats.
issues_found.fix: Created .ava/mcp.json with correct servers array format

mcp_details.reason: npx @playwright/mcp@latest hangs on initialization — no timeout in MCP client. The npx command itself works (verified with --help), but the MCP client initialization blocks indefinitely when spawning the process.

test_runs.result: PASS — tool.before/after/session.end all fire, log file created
PASS — code-stats listed as enabled with tool.before, tool.after, session.end hooks

test_runs.command: ava 'Use bash to run...' --headless --provider openrouter --model moonshotai/kimi-k2.5 --max-turns 2
test_runs.result: PASS — [code-stats] -> tool / [code-stats] <- tool messages appear for every tool call, session summary printed at end
FAIL — process hangs on MCP initialization, never returns

summary: Built a fully functional code-stats TypeScript plugin that hooks into tool.before, tool.after, and session.end lifecycle events. The plugin: (1) logs tool name + timestamp to .ava/code-stats.log on tool.before, (2) logs result status + duration on tool.after, (3) prints a session summary table on session.end. The plugin is discovered by 'ava plugin list', spawned correctly, and its hooks fire for every tool call during agent sessions (verified with tool read/bash calls). Two pre-existing compile errors in ava-mcp block rebuilding the binary, but the pre-built binary (from before the errors were introduced) has full MCP support compiled in. MCP config discovery requires .ava/mcp.json (AVA format with 'servers' array), not the project-root .mcp.json (Claude Code format with 'mcpServers' object). However, the playwright MCP server initialization hangs indefinitely due to a missing timeout in the MCP client — the npx process never completes its MCP handshake within a reasonable time.
